title: Cannot read 48 bit output value
body:
I have a module (simple simulation of a DSP48E1).

One of the ports is 
    output logic signed[47:0] p_out

My C++ code is capturing it with a uint64_t. When I check the VCD file I see all 48bits get set. However the C++ code is only able to read the least significant 32 bits.

verilator --version
Verilator 4.104 2020-11-14 rev v4.102-88-g02cb3d17a
